defs: The act of governing; the exercise of authority; the administration of laws; control; direction; regulation; as, civil, church, or family government.
The mode of governing; the system of polity in a state; the established form of law.
quotes: That free government which we have so dearly purchased, free commonwealth.

defs: The right or power of governing; authority.
quotes: I here resign my government to thee.

defs: The person or persons authorized to administer the laws; the ruling power; the administration.
quotes: When we, in England, speak of the government, we generally understand the ministers of the crown for the time being.

defs: The body politic governed by one authority; a state; as, the governments of Europe.
Management of the limbs or body.
The influence of a word in regard to construction, requiring that another word should be in a particular case.
